title: I Release Loneliness. I Allow Closeness.
subtitle: A release-and-allow energy statement for the loneliness that has settled in
excerpt: A release-and-allow energy statement for persistent loneliness. The statement releases the loneliness and opens toward closeness, connection, and belonging. Used when the loneliness is not acute but has become a background condition.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca J Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when loneliness has settled into a background state rather than an acute feeling. Good when the sense of disconnection is persistent and you want to consciously open toward connection.

content.text: An energy statement for loneliness that has settled in. It releases the loneliness and opens toward closeness and belonging.
I am ready to release the loneliness. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow closeness, connection, and belonging. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Original to homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca J Page, 2024).
